ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed le labo at position 3 (18.0% probability) vs top pick Blake (42.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~24.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Blake > Davy Crockett, but actual result was Le Labo > Blake. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Le Labo had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
